text.title: Risk Assessment Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Risk Assessment methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: identify-candidates
step.action: Brainstorm risks across product / market / regulatory / financial / operational dimensions.

step.name: score-likelihood-severity
step.action: Assign P10/P50/P90 likelihood + severity 1-5 per candidate.

step.name: assign-owner-trigger-decision
step.action: For each risk, name owner + observable trigger + decision.

step.name: rank-and-cap
step.action: Sort by severity x P50 likelihood; cap top 7; rest -> parked.
